name: Basic Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: Vegetable peels, leaves, or stems (celery, parsley, broccoli, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. To make vegetable stock: Combine all ingredients in a large pot and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer, covered for 30 minutes.
3. Strain the liquid and reserve.
4. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
5. Add onions, carrots, and celery; sauté until browned.
6. Stir in beans and vegetable stock. Cook, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
7. Puree remaining beans and vegetable stock together in batches with an immersion blender or regular blender.
8. Return purée to pot and stir in fennel, basil, oregano, bay leaf, prepared mustard, tomato paste, and garlic powder.
9. Add reserved vegetable stock and bring to a boil.
10. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
Per serving: 170 calories; 9g protein; 221mg sodium; 30g carbohydrates; 4g fat; 0mg cholesterol; 104 calories
